summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Explorateur des Filières Professionnelles feature. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All 13 frontend UI tests passed (100%). The feature correctly displays hierarchical navigation from Filières → Secteurs → Métiers → Compétences with chain links to Qualités → Valeurs → Vertus.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/referentiel/explorer/stats returns correct counts (20 filieres, 85 secteurs, 45 metiers)
GET /api/referentiel/explorer/metier/ingénieur en mécanique returns full detail with chains
GET /api/referentiel/explorer/search?q=leadership returns savoir_faire and savoir_etre results
Search results have correct type fields
Secteur counts match between explorer and stats
Metier chain data is complete (savoirs_faire, savoirs_etre with qualites/valeurs/vertus)
frontend_ui_tests: Explorateur nav link visible and clickable
Statistics cards show: 20 Filières, 85 Secteurs, 45 Métiers, 105 Savoir-faire, 11 Savoir-être
Clicking filière-1 expands to show 6 secteurs
Clicking métier opens detail view with data-testid='metier-detail'
Detail view shows Savoir-faire (10) and Savoir-être (11) sections
Savoir-être shows chain badges: QUALITÉS, VALEURS, VERTUS
Back button returns to tree view
Search 'leadership' shows results with SAVOIR-FAIRE and SAVOIR-ÊTRE categories

seed_data_creation: ODS data was previously imported into MongoDB collections: referentiel_metiers, referentiel_metiers_flat, referentiel_se_links
context_for_next_testing_agent: Explorateur feature fully tested. Data imported from ODS file with 20 filières, 85 secteurs, 45 métiers. Tree navigation works: click filière to expand secteurs, click secteur to load métiers via API, click métier to see full detail with savoir-faire/savoir-être. Savoir-être includes chain: qualités_humaines → valeurs → vertus displayed as colored badges. Search works across all categories. Backend endpoints at /api/referentiel/explorer/* all functional.

backend_endpoints./api/referentiel/explorer: ✓ Returns 20 filieres with secteurs and metiers_count
backend_endpoints./api/referentiel/explorer/stats: ✓ Returns counts: 20 filieres, 85 secteurs, 45 metiers, 105 savoirs_faire, 11 savoirs_etre
backend_endpoints./api/referentiel/explorer/secteur/{name}: ✓ Returns metiers with savoirs for given secteur
backend_endpoints./api/referentiel/explorer/metier/{name}: ✓ Returns full metier detail with savoir-faire (capacite_technique) and savoir-être (qualites/valeurs/vertus chain)
backend_endpoints./api/referentiel/explorer/search: ✓ Searches across all categories and returns typed results

frontend_ui.stats_cards: ✓ 5 stat cards showing filieres, secteurs, metiers, savoirs_faire, savoirs_etre
